plan.description: Read src/eventEmitter.ts to understand the current API: on(), emit(), off().
Add a once() method that registers a listener which auto-removes itself after being called once. Also add a listenerCount(event) method that returns the number of registered listeners for an event.
Create src/eventEmitter.test.ts with tests covering: on/emit basics, off removes listeners, once fires exactly once then is removed, listenerCount returns correct counts.

initialState.task: Add once() and listenerCount() methods to EventEmitter and write tests.
